title: Amazon GuardDuty Finding
description: Represents an Amazon GuardDuty security finding with its associated details, severity, and metadata.

id.description: The unique identifier of the finding

accountId.description: The AWS account ID where the finding was generated

region.description: The AWS Region where the finding was generated

severity.description: The severity of the finding (0.0 to 10.0)

confidence.description: The confidence level of the finding

resource.description: The resource affected by the finding

instanceDetails.description: Details about the EC2 instance involved

accessKeyDetails.description: Details about the IAM access key involved

count.description: The number of times this finding was observed

detectorId.description: The detector ID that generated the finding

createdAt.description: The time the finding was first observed

updatedAt.description: The time the finding was last updated
